## Thread

1. If you want the signal instead of the noise in AI, start with this story.

2. AI firm Anthropic rejects unrestricted US military use looks like a broader industry shift that is worth keeping on the radar this morning.

4. Suggested angle: explain how this changes the market, product decisions, or day-to-day work.

## Notes

- Keep each post punchy and scannable.
- If the thread underperforms early, reuse the original take as a single standalone post later.
